title: Oil Surges, US Futures Drop on Hormuz Blockade: Markets Wrap
snippet: Brent crude $102 (+8%), WTI $104 (+8%) after Trump's blockade announcement. US gas average $4.12/gal, up 38% since war start. US equity futures declined.
tag_reason: New market data on oil price surge following blockade announcement. First specific pricing data for April 12.
